subject: feat(api): add verifyPassphrase and updateSequence with snake_case fields
body:
Add API client functions for endpoints not yet wired up, coded as if
the backend already supports them (per CLAUDE.md convention):
- verifyPassphrase: sends { project_id, passphrase }, returns { project_id }
- updateSequence: sends { action, module_order }

Both use snake_case JSON keys over the wire (B2, B4, B8 from spec).

Tags: api, frontend, snake-case
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: api
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: backend-integration
Semver: minor

title: add verifyPassphrase and updateSequence with snake_case fields
